titleStmt.title: SII 19.170: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao, Dines Chandra Sircar and G.S. Gai
No. 170. (A.R. No. 121 of 1926.) TIRUVIḶAKKUḌĪ, MAYAVARAM TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT. ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE, MAṆAVĀḶĒŚVARA TEMPLE.

summary.p: This registers a sale of land tax-free by the assembly of Viḍēlviḍugu-chaturvēdimaṅgalam a brahmadēya in Nallāṟṟūr-nāḍu on the northern bank to a merchant by name Śaṅkavaṉ Maṉṟaṉ alias Nānādēśīya Eḍuttapāda-Mūttaśeṭṭi of the village Vidēlvidugudēvi-chaturvēdimaṅgalam a brahmadēya on the south side of the river in Kurukkai-nāḍu, who endowed it for a perpetual lamp before god Kūttaperumāḷ (Natarāja) at Tiruvēḷvikkuḍi. The gift was placed in charge of (the mercantile community) Dis11aiyāyira taiññūṟṟuvar. The writing appears to be comparatively late.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . kopparakesaripanmaṟku yāṇṭu Āṟāvatu vaṭakarai nallāṟṟūrnāṭṭu brahmadeyam viṭelviṭukucatu
rvetimaṅkalattu sabhaiyom viṟṟa nilavilaiyāvaṇam ceytukuṭuttom Ikkarai kuṟukkai caikanāṭṭu brahma
deyam viṭelviṭukudeviccaturvetimaṅkalattu tiruveḷvikkuṭik kūttaperumāḷukku tiru non=tāviḷakki
ṉukkuāka viṟṟukkuṭutta nilam kha� Ivveṭalviṭukucaturvetimaṅkalattu Ūriṉ kiḻḻur kuṟiyākkuṭi maṅkala
ttu Ellai vāykkarai Aṟumāc ceyyum viṟṟukkuṭuttataṟku kiḻpāṟkellai varampu[ kku m] E ṟkum teṉpāṟkellai Ikkoḷkiṉ
ṟa kūttapperumāḷ nilattukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai Uḷciṟuvāykkālukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai kuravaceriyār
kaḷ nilattukku pāynta Uḷciṟuvāykkālukkum kuralaceriyārkaḷ nilattukku teṟkku miv vicaitta In nāṉkellaiyilu
makappaṭṭa nilam Uṇṇilam Oḻiviṉṟi mikutikkuṟaimai Uḷḷaṭaṅka Iv Orukālāvatum Irukālāvatu
mukkālāvatum viṟṟu vilaiyāvaṇam ceytu kuṭutta Innilattukku Emmil yicaiñca
poruḷ maṟṟum Āvaṇakkaḷatte ṇṭu Ituve
ṇamum Ituve poru volaiyāva
tākavum veṟu poruḷmāvaṟuti poruḷ Avalātārākavu
m Ipparicu vilaiyaṟa viṟṟu poruḷaṟak koṇṭu ṇañceytu
cantrādityavaṟ Iṟaiyili ceytukuṭuttom kūttaperumā sabhaiyo
m kuṟi Iruntu paṇikka Eḻutineṉ madhyasthaṉ Aññūṟṟuvaneṉ Innila
m koṇṭu kuṭutteṉ caṅkayaṉ maṉṟanā nānāteciya Eṭuttapāta
muttaceṭṭiyeṉ Ivane tiruveḻvikkuṭiuṭaiyārukku cantirātitavaṟ vaitta
Āṭṭu viḷakku 1 Iddharmmam ticaiyāyirattaññūṟṟuvar per Ivarkaḷ rakṣai
Iṅke kūttapperumāḷukku Iṭṭa nilaiviḷa veḷ
Digital edition of SII 19.170 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
